task_description: Implement full audio processing pipeline following TDD: Lambda downloads from S3, processes audio (or synthesizes via Polly for text), uploads to output bucket, updates DynamoDB metadata. Update CDK stack with proper permissions and environment variables. Update ARCHITECTURE.md documentation.

verification.summary: All 182 tests pass (including 34 new tests). cdk synth succeeds for dev and prod environments. Tests meaningfully exercise S3 download/upload, Polly synthesis, DynamoDB updates, error handling, and CDK infrastructure assertions.
